$comment: Parser regression corpus distilled from the 2026-07-04 MathNet sweep (see ce-mathnet-experiment.md), with follow-up cases appended from fresh-sweep-report.md and a later shifted sample. fragments = LaTeX from problem statements that did NOT parse clean when selected; unicodeAnswers = non-prose final_answer strings (mixed Unicode/ASCII math) that failed when selected. `observed` records the current parser outcome as of `lastChecked`. A case is FIXED when ce.parse() yields a valid expression with no Error subexpression (and no throw). Regenerate from scratch with scripts/ (see README.md).
